message:
test(fuzz): add MeshSessionHello transcript sign/verify binding fuzz target (resolves 41uql)

MeshSessionHello::sign + verify (session.rs:374-390) is the Ed25519
inner-transcript signature, distinct from verify_cookie (674lv: cookie
HMAC), verify_session_mac (session_metamorphic: per-frame MAC), and
NodeKeyAttestation (xedeu: owner attestation). The transcript covers
b"FCP2-HELLO-V1" || from || to || eph_pubkey || nonce || cookie ||
timestamp || suites || transport_limits.

A regression in the per-field binding lets an attacker pivot a captured
hello between (from, to, eph_pubkey, ...) tuples — the responder
accepts a different tuple than was signed.

Four properties:
- round-trip sign → verify
- per-field binding via mutate_one_field across 7 field positions; only
  asserted when the mutation actually changed transcript_bytes (avoids
  false positives from no-op mutations like clearing already-None cookie)
- wrong-key rejection (signed under A, verified under B)
- MissingSignature error on unsigned hello

Once-gated regression anchors:
- (a) timestamp binding: hello signed at t=1 MUST NOT verify at t=2
  (transcript-layer replay guard, parallel to 674lv anchor for cookie)
- (b) eph_pubkey binding: hello signed with eph A MUST NOT verify with
  eph B (transcript-layer ephemeral swap-in guard)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -568,5 +568,12 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_hello_transcript_binding"
+path = "fuzz_targets/hello_transcript_binding.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [workspace]
 members = ["."]
